## Outcome

What is now true, and for whom?

## Why

Link the issue, evidence, design, or ADR. Explain material tradeoffs.

## Changes

- Describe the smallest coherent set of changes.

## Verification evidence

- [ ] Foundation and applicable format/lint/type/test/build checks pass.
- [ ] Relevant success and failure paths were exercised.
- [ ] User-visible changes were checked in a browser at relevant viewport sizes.
- [ ] Accessibility and keyboard behavior were checked when applicable.
- [ ] Authorization or validation changes include denial/negative tests.

Commands and observed results:

```text

```

## Data, security, and operations

Describe migrations, sensitive data, authorization, secrets, logs, dependencies, deployment configuration, monitoring, or rollback implications. Write `None` only after reviewing them.

## Visual evidence

Add before/after images or recordings for visual changes. Otherwise write `Not applicable`.

## Remaining risk or follow-up

State known limitations and link follow-up issues. Do not hide unfinished required work here.
